generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance AdaptiveCruiseControlMotorActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation for ACC via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for the vehicle's lower-level chassis"
]

instance SteeringServoActuation : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering mechanism actuation handled implicitly through the lower-level chassis steering mechanism"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Handled via remote management UI triggering immediate braking actuation in the physical twin"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for 3D object detection and tracking in the vehicle's proximity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for environmental perception and 3D mapping"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageData
]

instance EgoVehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "ROS2-based state sensor measuring ego vehicle speed via onboard speed controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance EgoVehicleSteeringSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "ROS2-based state sensor measuring steering angle via chassis sensors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleSteeringSensor
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleData
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance Vehicle3DModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD-derived virtual representation of the autonomous vehicle for visualization purposes"
]

instance ObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Sensor data models derived from LiDAR point clouds via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object tracks (position, velocity, size)"
]

instance AdaptiveCruiseControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC logic based on ISO 15622 for lead vehicle detection and speed calculation"
]

instance HistoricalDataDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing object tracks and ego vehicle state for historical analysis"
]

instance RealTimeStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) and detected object tracks for real-time monitoring"
]

instance ProjectedPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed driving path projected via ACC control logic (ISO 15622) for visualization"
]

instance ObjectTrackClusteringData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-processed object tracks derived from raw LiDAR point clouds"
]

instance KalmanFilteredData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Kalman-filtered object tracks for accurate position and velocity estimation"
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2) for real-time communication and component orchestration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for onboard processing of ACC components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotorActuationFE
    DTDFVocab:enables SteeringServoActuation
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingModel
]

instance Python38Prototyping : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping of ACC system components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance CPlusPlusROS2Nodes : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management and real-time control execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotorActuationFE
    DTDFVocab:enables SteeringServoActuation
]

instance MATLABSimulinkClustering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems like point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingModel
]

instance CloudComputationInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computation to cloud servers for resource efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveCruiseControlLogic
]

instance RealTimeRenderingLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D rendering libraries for real-time visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Feature Engine for ISO 23247 compliance in data serialization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CloudComputationInfrastructure
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance ISO15622Standards : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 for ACC performance standards and compliance"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveCruiseControlLogic
]

instance ISO23247ReferenceArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for Digital Twin entity mapping"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeStateVisualization
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable time-series reports of object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataReport
]

instance ACCComputationOffloading : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation) from vehicle ECU to cloud-based hardware"
    DTDFVocab:provides CloudProcessedACCData
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, or trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicParameterAdjustment
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ACCPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state and object tracks enables operators to assess ACC performance"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Object track data can inform predictive maintenance (e.g., brake system health)"
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote management UI allows dynamic adjustments to ACC settings (e.g., desired speed)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ExperimentalDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Purposeful experimentation via DT enables testing ACC under varied conditions without physical vehicle intervention"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RealTimeStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D rendering of current vehicle state and object tracks for immediate operational assessment"
]

instance HistoricalDataReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series analysis of past vehicle and object interactions for trend analysis"
]

instance CloudProcessedACCData : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Processed ACC calculations returned from cloud servers for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DynamicParameterAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of ACC parameters (speed, acceleration) during operation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoLiDAR
    base:contains IntelDepthCamera
    base:contains EgoVehicleSpeedSensor
    base:contains EgoVehicleSteeringSensor
    base:contains AdaptiveCruiseControlMotorActuation
    base:contains SteeringServoActuation
    base:contains ObjectTrackingModel
    base:contains AdaptiveCruiseControlLogic
]

instance DigitalTwinSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ROS2Middleware
    base:contains NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
    base:contains Python38Prototyping
    base:contains CPlusPlusROS2Nodes
    base:contains MATLABSimulinkClustering
    base:contains CloudComputationInfrastructure
    base:contains RealTimeRenderingLibrary
    base:contains DataTranslationFE
    base:contains DataMonitoringService
    base:contains ReportGenerationService
    base:contains ACCComputationOffloading
    base:contains RemoteManagementService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction includes: (1) **Remote Management Commands**: Enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, or trigger emergency braking via the **Control Panel User Interface FE**; (2) **Computation Offloading**: ACC control logic (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation) is executed remotely on cloud-based hardware (e.g., cloud servers) and sent back to the vehicle as desired speed commands; (3) **Actuation Signals**: Motor voltage commands and steering adjustments are generated by the **Actuation FE** and transmitted to the physical twin’s lower-level chassis via ROS2 topics. The system adheres to ISO 15622 ACC standards for performance class I."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DTS operates on a **real-time, event-driven time scale** with the following synchronization requirements: (1) **Data Collection**: Object tracks and ego vehicle state are updated every **perception cycle** (typically <100 ms, aligned with LiDAR refresh rates); (2) **Virtual-to-Physical Latency**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency for ACC control commands (3GPP 22.185 compliance); (3) **Clock Synchronization**: Devices share a global time reference with **100 ms accuracy** (due to hardware limitations), ensuring event ordering and data integrity in distributed systems."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DTS constellation consists of three primary entities from ISO 23247, with custom adaptations: (1) **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts automotive-specific components (e.g., point cloud clustering, actuation) and replaces the OME; (2) **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection (object tracks, ego state), visualization preprocessing, and reporting; (3) **User Entity**: Split into **3D Visualization FE** (for monitoring) and **Control Panel FE** (for remote management). The system uses **ROS2** for intra-entity communication and **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication (Data Translation FE). The constellation is centralized, with no cross-entity replication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DTS spans the following life-cycle stages: (1) **Design Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC validation (ISO 15622 compliance); (2) **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance during vehicle operation; (3) **Representation Phase**: Operates as a **real-time, high-fidelity** model of the physical twin, covering the **as-operated** stage (not designed or manufactured). The system does not support lifecycle management tools like digital threads for end-to-end information flow."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through: (1) **Real-Time Data Collection**: LiDAR and depth camera data processed at <100 ms per cycle; (2) **Control Logic Validation**: ACC follows ISO 15622 standards for performance class I; (3) **Verification**: Clock synchronization (±100 ms) and end-to-end latency testing; (4) **Uncertainty Handling**: Object tracks use DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for robustness; (5) **Validation**: Case study validates ACC functionality on a 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle. No explicit uncertainty quantification or error bounds are specified."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DTS employs the following technical connections: (1) **Communication Protocols**: ROS2 (for intra-entity, on-vehicle communication) and Wi-Fi (for inter-entity, cloud-to-vehicle communication); (2) **Data Serialization**: Data Translation FE (ISO 23247) serializes messages, aligns types, and performs unit conversions; (3) **Network Architecture**: Point-to-point ROS2 topics for local communication; Wi-Fi-based UDP communication for remote management; (4) **Latency Constraints**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (3GPP 22.185), enforced via timing measurements."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DTS is deployed in a hybrid architecture: (1) **Onboard Hardware**: NVIDIA Jetson NX/Orin Nano microcomputers host the Physical Twin Entity and Data Collection FE; (2) **Cloud Hosting**: ACC control logic is offloaded to cloud servers for computation; (3) **Storage**: External SQL databases store historical data; (4) **Visualization**: 3D rendering occurs on onboard hardware or cloud-based visualization servers. The system adheres to ISO 23247’s entity-based deployment but extends it with custom hardware mappings."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DTS integrates horizontally with: (1) **External Systems**: Cloud-based ACC computation servers; (2) **Sensors**: LiDAR, depth camera, and onboard speed/steering sensors; (3) **Actuators**: Motor and steering servos; (4) **Standards**: ISO 15622 (ACC), ISO 23247 (reference architecture), 3GPP 22.185 (V2V communication). No explicit mention of integration with other DTs or external automotive information systems (e.g., fleet coordination) is provided."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is ambiguous: (1) **Physical Twin Data**: Owned by the vehicle operator (sensors, actuators); (2) **Digital Twin Data**: Stored externally (SQL databases) but not explicitly attributed to a service provider; (3) **Privacy Considerations**: No explicit privacy safeguards are mentioned. Data is transmitted over Wi-Fi (unencrypted by default) and processed via ROS2 (no mention of encryption)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DTS adheres to the following standards: (1) **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for digital twins (adapted for automotive); (2) **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control performance standards (performance class I); (3) **3GPP 22.185**: V2V communication latency requirements; (4) **ROS2**: Robot Operating System 2 for middleware; (5) **ISO/IEC 30173**: Digital twin terminology (conceptual definitions). Custom mappings (e.g., Physical Twin Entity) deviate from ISO 23247’s OME concept."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through: (1) **Remote Management**: Emergency braking commands are prioritized to prevent accidents; (2) **Latency Constraints**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency ensures timely actuation; (3) **Clock Synchronization**: 100 ms accuracy prevents timing-based attacks; (4) **Human-in-the-Loop**: Operators monitor real-time data to override DT decisions; (5) **Hardware Safety**: LiDAR and depth camera data are processed in real-time to avoid sensor-induced failures. No explicit mention of encryption, authentication, or intrusion detection is provided."
]
